title: 『1度殻をむいた卵は食すのみ』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite all the special training she's been doing
at summer camp, Sakura Chiyono O's time hasn't
improved. All she can think about is her crumbling
strength and how her dream of becoming
Maruzensky's rival may be slipping away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While stuck in her negative thoughts, she's
invited by Yaeno Muteki to watch Mejiro Ardan's
comeback race. Not only is Mejiro Ardan
recovered, but she's even stronger than before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O feels like she's looking at her
own polar opposite. It dawns on her that she'll
never be able to return to how she was, and she
runs away, overwhelmed by the realization.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky chases after her. She understands
what Sakura Chiyono O is going through. Even if
she can't return to her heyday, Maruzensky
realized she can keep changing for the better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spark from her rivalry with Sakura Chiyono O
gave Maruzensky the inspiration to overcome her
old self, igniting a desire not to lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Maruzensky acknowledge her as a rival,
Sakura Chiyono O's own flame is reignited. She
decides to stop running away from her reality and
stands her ground with resolve.
